zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton於大約1150年出生在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓時，他的父親Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton26歲，母親Margery de Aldithley14歲。他和Margery de Aldithley至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1203年享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pershall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Perschall, a variant of Parschall (see Parshall ); alternatively, a variant of Perschel, from a pet form of Persch, a short form of Berthold or Peter in the border area with Czechia.

variants.name: Parshall
meanings: Americanized form of South German Parschall, a variant of Parschalk, a status name for a freeholder (a freeman with few service obligations), from Middle High German bar ‘naked’, ‘free from, apparent’ + schalk ‘servant, man’. See Pershall .

nameMeanings.name: Swinnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton was born about 1150, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton, was 26 and his mother, Margery de Aldithley, was 14. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Margery de Aldithley. He died in 1203, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton est né environ 1150, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery de Aldithley, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Margery de Aldithley. Il est décédé en 1203, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton um 1150 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton 26 und seine Mutter Margery de Aldithley 14. Er hatte mit Margery de Aldithley mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1203 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton è nato il circa 1150 nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Aldithley, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Margery de Aldithley. Morì nel 1203, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert De Pershall De Swinnertonが約1150年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで生まれた時，父Robert FitzAlan of Swynnertonは26歳，母Margery de Aldithleyは14歳であった。彼はMargery de Aldithleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1203年に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Aldithley(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Margery de Aldithley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1203년 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Aldithley, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Margery de Aldithley. Ele faleceu em 1203, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton родился около 1150 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Aldithley, 14. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Margery de Aldithley. Он умер в 1203 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert De Pershall De Swinnerton nació aproximadamente 1150, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert FitzAlan of Swynnerton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margery de Aldithley, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Margery de Aldithley. Murió en 1203, a la edad de 54 años.
